Wu Mian еҗіе…Қ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Mian (еҗіе…Қ)was born in Kuaiji. Local leader on the upper Min River between JianвҖҷan and Houguan counties. Destroyed by He Qi.
